purpose: Measurement matrix only. Reviewer path-to-release, product positioning, and 24/48-hour plan live in canonicalPathToRelease.

step1.name: setup
step1.question: Can the user or harness reach the intended STT engine with the right account, tier, build mode, STT mode, model/provider/runtime, mic/input route, and instrumentation?
step1.rule: Do not score accuracy, timing, or release quality when setup fails.

step2.name: execution
step2.question: Once setup is proven, does the STT path meet accuracy, speed, readability, filler, and save/history/detail expectations versus its baseline?
step2.rule: Name the first broken product metric when execution fails.

rules: No setup proof, no STT scoring.
No execution proof, no release claim.
Every failure must be classified as either SETUP or EXECUTION.
Every SETUP failure must name the exact failed setup substep.
Every EXECUTION failure must name the exact failed execution substep.

setupSubsteps.name: Build and environment
setupSubsteps.passCondition: Correct build mode, app URL, secrets, and test/live mode are proven.

setupSubsteps.name: Auth and entitlement
setupSubsteps.passCondition: User is signed in and effective Free/Pro tier matches the STT path.

setupSubsteps.name: STT mode selected
setupSubsteps.passCondition: Intended STT mode is visible and machine-readable.

setupSubsteps.name: Model/provider/runtime ready
setupSubsteps.passCondition: Private model/provider/runtime or Cloud/Native provider is ready before scoring.

setupSubsteps.name: Mic/audio route
setupSubsteps.passCondition: Requested mic constraints or human-mic/input route are captured and valid.

setupSubsteps.name: Evidence hooks
setupSubsteps.passCondition: Required logs, timing fields, transcript states, and artifact writers are populated.

executionSubsteps.name: First text/draft
executionSubsteps.passCondition: First usable interim/draft/final text appears within the mode budget.

executionSubsteps.name: Final transcript completeness
executionSubsteps.passCondition: Final transcript preserves beginning, middle, tail, and expected length.

executionSubsteps.name: Accuracy and fillers
executionSubsteps.passCondition: Accuracy, filler recall, and false filler insertion meet baseline/target.

executionSubsteps.name: Punctuation/readability
executionSubsteps.passCondition: Terminal punctuation, sentence boundaries, casing, no run-on text, no duplication.

executionSubsteps.name: Stop/save/history/detail
executionSubsteps.passCondition: Stop selects the intended transcript and saved/history/detail match it.

executionSubsteps.name: Timing budget
executionSubsteps.passCondition: Finalization and detail visibility are within the mode-specific budget.

currentBuckets.reason: Private/Vault setup did not finish; Start stayed disabled.
Setup reached recording, but transcript captured only 8 words against 87 expected.
Requests are valid, but keyterms hurt h1_6 accuracy.
Chrome produced words, but readability and stop/save/detail failed.

retiredCandidates.reason: Retired from release-candidate comparison because washington_01 measured materially lower accuracy than v2/v4 while v4 is already the latest stable @huggingface/transformers line.

metricGate: Each visible STT path must match or exceed its corresponding drop-in/customer baseline on product metrics, or be caveated/de-emphasized. Release interpretation lives in canonicalPathToRelease.

metricContract.accuracyPct: Not materially worse than drop-in/customer baseline.
metricContract.sentenceCount: Roughly matches expected script sentence count.
metricContract.maxRunOnWords: No sentence-like span over 45 words; 35 preferred.
metricContract.readabilityVerdict: Pass/fail summary of punctuation, casing, and duplication.
metricContract.finalizationWaitMs: Short speech target <=8000; hard limit <=12000. 60s speech target <=20000; hard limit <=30000.

results.route: page getUserMedia override with per-fixture WAV injected at mic request time
results.transcript: On the one hand, I was summoned by my country, whose voice I can never hear but with veneration and love, from a retreat which I had chosen with the fondest predilection, and, in my flattering hopes, with an immutable decision, as the asylum of my declining years, on the other hand, the magnitude and difficulty of the trust to which the voice of my country called me, being sufficient to awaken in the wisest and most experienced of her citizens a distrustful scrutiny into his qualifications, could not but overwhelm with despondence one who ought to be peculiarly conscious of his own deficiencies. In this conflict of emotions all I dare a veris that it has been my faithful study to collect my duty from a just appreciation of every circumstance by which it might be affected. All I dare hope is that if, in executing this task, I have been too much swayed by a grateful remembrance of former instances. My error will be palliated by the motives which mislead me, and its consequences be judged by my country with some share of the partiality in which they originated.
results.releaseRead: long-form browser proof passed accuracy and timing budget; readability still checked by max run-on metric
results.artifactNote: Artifact selectedForSaveTranscript field is an 80-char preview; full final/save/detail text is present in transcript/postStopTranscript/detailTranscript and selected length is 1074.

blockers: stop did not settle: page.waitForFunction: Timeout 60000ms exceeded.
Native session did not expose saved-session marker.
results.timingNote: Corrected 2026-06-02: artifact contains a second auto-start after stop; timing uses the stopped session boundary and nativeAudioReady for first-session audio start. recordingStateAt was not retained for the stopped session in the available trace.

private.firstAudioChunkQueuedAt: First usable audio chunk queued to worker.
private.firstDraftVisibleAt: UI displayed first Private draft text.

native.onaudiostartAt: Chrome Web Speech audio pipeline started.

derived.micToSpeechDetectedMs: Capture/VAD delay for Private, or mic-to-speechstart for Native.
derived.finalInferenceEndToSaveMs: App/backend save delay after final decode.
derived.micToFirstInterimMs: Native/Cloud first text latency from mic start.
derived.firstFinalToSelectedForSaveMs: App selection delay after provider/browser final.

cloud.reason: Cheap credentialed subset on current code is valid: baseline 96.3% accuracy / 83.33% filler recall; keyterms 91.67% / 100%. Keyterms improves filler recall but hurts h1_6 accuracy, so baseline remains safer until a larger baseline-vs-keyterms proof passes.
cloud.next: Run larger baseline-vs-keyterms proof without prompt/u3-rt-pro; then rerun app trace proof.

private.reason: Current injected browser proof is much improved: Washington 65.8s 98.95%, h1 guard rows mostly 100%, h1_6 87.5%. Still not green because Washington readability fails max run-on gate, v4 browser proof is not captured, and physical/human mic route was unavailable in this environment.
private.next: Resolve readability/punctuation for medium speech; run v4 browser proof if v4 is candidate; rerun human/physical mic when audio output works.

native.reason: Human real-mic proof ran and failed product readiness: Chrome produced words, but selectedForSave became Listening..., save/detail failed, readability failed, and filler recall was 66.67%.
native.next: Dev must fix/clarify stop-save selection; product must decide Native formatter activation/copy; rerun human Chrome mic proof.
